parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ score: $json.computed_score, score_status: 'scored', score_updated_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ from: 'Deal Machine <noreply@agencygroup.pt>', to: ['geral@agencygroup.pt'], subject: '🔥 Off-Market Score Alto: ' + $json.nome + ' (' + $json.computed_score + '/100 Tier ' + $json.tier + ')', text: 'LEAD OFF-MARKET

Nome: ' + $json.nome + '
Score: ' + $json.computed_score + '/100 Tier ' + $json.tier + '
Cidade: ' + ($json.cidade||'—') + '
Preço: ' + ($json.price_ask ? '€' + Number($json.price_ask/1000).toFixed(0) + 'K' : '—') + '
DPS: ' + ($json.deal_priority_score||'—') + '
Ataque: ' + ($json.attack_recommendation||'—').substring(0,80) + '
Preclose: ' + ($json.preclose_candidate ? 'SIM' : 'NAO') + '
Fonte: ' + $json.source + '
Portal: https://www.agencygroup.pt/portal' }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const lead = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { status: 'ok', id: lead.id, score: lead.computed_score, tier: lead.tier, nome: lead.nome, dps: lead.deal_priority_score, preclose: lead.preclose_candidate } }];
